name: Terran Republic
description: The remnants of humanity's unified government, the Terran Republic fields powerful, well-balanced fleets. Their ships are rugged, reliable, and designed for sustained campaigns across deep space. The Republic favors coordinated fleet tactics and overwhelming firepower delivered in disciplined volleys.

specialRules.name: Iron Resolve
specialRules.description: Terran ships may re-roll one defense die per combat round.

specialRules.name: Fleet Doctrine
specialRules.description: When 3+ Terran ships are within 6" of each other, all gain +1 to hit.

name: Void Syndicate
description: A shadowy network of mercenaries, pirates, and rogue AI collectives, the Void Syndicate excels at hit-and-run tactics. Their ships are fast, lightly armored, and bristling with experimental weapons. The Syndicate never fights fair—and always fights to win.

specialRules.name: Shadow Protocol
specialRules.description: Once per game, a Syndicate ship may become undetectable for one round.

specialRules.name: Scavenge
specialRules.description: When a Syndicate ship destroys an enemy, roll a die—on 4+, recover 1 module.

name: Chorus Collective
description: An ancient hive-mind species that perceives the universe as pure resonant energy, the Chorus Collective fields living starships that grow, adapt, and evolve mid-battle. Their technology is incomprehensible to most species, blending organic biotech with exotic energy manipulation.

specialRules.name: Bio-Regeneration
specialRules.description: At the start of each round, heal 1 hull point on each Chorus ship.

specialRules.name: Resonance Link
specialRules.description: Chorus ships within 4" of each other share defensive bonuses.

name: Iron Dominion
description: A totalitarian empire built on conquest and absolute order, the Iron Dominion fields the largest, most heavily armored warships in the known galaxy. Their dreadnoughts are mobile fortresses, their doctrine is attrition, and their goal is total subjugation.

specialRules.name: Unyielding
specialRules.description: Iron Dominion ships ignore the first point of damage each round.

specialRules.name: Suppression Fire
specialRules.description: Enemy ships within 8" of an Iron Dominion Dreadnought suffer -1 to attack rolls.
